description.en: The fundamental network layer protocol of the Internet. Handles addressing, routing and fragmentation of packets between hosts across networks.
description.zh: 互联网的基础网络层协议。负责跨网络的主机间数据包寻址、路由和分片。

ihl.zh: 头部长度，单位32位字 (最小5, 最大15)

tos.en: Type of Service, indicates priority and handling (now DSCP/ECN)
tos.zh: 服务类型，指示优先级和处理方式 (现为DSCP/ECN)

totalLength.en: Total packet length in bytes, including header and data
totalLength.zh: 整个数据包的总长度（字节），包含头部和数据

identification.en: Unique ID for reassembling fragmented packets
identification.zh: 唯一标识符，用于重组分片数据包

flags.zh: 分片标志 (bit0=保留, bit1=DF禁止分片, bit2=MF更多分片)

fragmentOffset.en: Fragment position in original datagram, in 8-byte units
fragmentOffset.zh: 分片在原始数据报中的位置，单位8字节

ttl.en: Time to Live, decremented by each router, packet discarded at 0
ttl.zh: 生存时间，每经过一个路由器减1，为0时丢弃

headerChecksum.en: Header-only checksum, recomputed at each hop
headerChecksum.zh: 仅头部的校验和，每经过一跳重新计算

options.zh: 可变长度选项 (记录路由, 时间戳等)

payload.en: Upper layer protocol data (TCP, UDP, ICMP, etc.)
payload.zh: 上层协议数据 (TCP, UDP, ICMP等)
